overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character exploring an ornate medieval indoor bathhouse. The character moves from a marble sink area through a columned hall toward a wooden door, illuminated by warm wall sconces and hanging lanterns.

agents.ego_description: armored character stands near marble sinks surveying the washroom before turning to exit

entered.detail: row of white marble wash basins with silver faucets mounted on tiled wall
large rectangular mirror above the sinks reflecting the room
tall ornate wooden cabinet with glass doors and shelves
lit wall-mounted lantern with blue glass shade
lit wall-mounted lantern with blue glass shade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow washroom with marble sinks lining the left wall and a large wooden cabinet on the right. Warm light emanates from wall sconces as the armored character stands near the sinks, then turns to leave the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand columned hall with central fountain

events.description: character exits narrow washroom into spacious columned hall with high ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hall passing stone columns and central fountain basin

entered.detail: tall ornate stone pillar with carved capital and red banding
gothic arched doorway in the distant wall
lit lantern suspended from wooden ceiling beams
blue-tiled circular basin set into the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the washroom into a spacious hall dominated by a large stone column and a circular fountain basin. Hanging lanterns illuminate the wooden ceiling as the character walks toward a distant arched doorway.

events.description: character slows approach and stops at the wooden door

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the wooden door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: tan brick wall with vertical wooden support beams
tan brick wall with vertical wooden support beams

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the far wall where the arched doorway now reveals itself as a detailed wooden door with metal studs. The stone column and fountain recede behind as the character stops before the door, flanked by brick walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, intimate washroom into a grand, lantern-lit hall that culminates at a heavy wooden door. It begins in a narrow space lined with marble sinks and a large wooden cabinet, where warm light from wall sconces glows as the armored character turns to depart. As the character emerges from the washroom, the environment expands into a spacious hall featuring a massive stone column and a circular fountain basin beneath a wooden ceiling adorned with hanging lanterns. The scene then shifts focus toward the far end of the room, with the column and fountain receding as the character advances toward an arched opening. Finally, the camera comes to a halt before a detailed wooden door with metal studs, flanked by brick walls at the edge of the hall.
